pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. First time doing something like this? I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous but also excited about what's about to happen here.

Hey A, nice to meet you! Yeah, first time for me too. I'm definitely nervous but trying to stay focused — I really need to bring some money home for my family, so I'm hoping we can figure out what's going on here together.

Yeah, I totally get that — same situation here, man. Family's counting on me too. I like your attitude though, staying focused. Maybe we can compare notes as we learn more about how this game actually works?

Absolutely, I'm down for that. It'll definitely help to have someone I can trust to talk things through with. Have you got any sense yet of what the actual rules are gonna be, or are we both still in the dark?

Honestly, we're still pretty much in the dark — they haven't explained the rules yet. But I'm thinking once everyone's here and they lay it out, we'll get a clearer picture. I'm hoping it's something straightforward, but either way, having someone like you to think things through with will definitely help. We should probably pay attention to every detail they tell us.

Yeah, for sure — I'm gonna listen real carefully when they explain everything. And hey, if you catch something I miss, just let me know. We're in this together, so let's make sure we both understand what we're getting into before we make any moves.

Absolutely, I appreciate that. Same goes for you — if you spot something I miss, speak up. We'll keep each other sharp and make sure we're not walking into anything blind. This is turn 7, right? We've still got a few more chances to talk before things kick off, so let's stay connected.

Yeah, definitely — we've got three more chances to talk before this starts, so let's use them. I'm gonna ask around and see if anyone else knows anything about how these games usually work. Maybe we can pick up some intel that helps us both when the time comes.
That's smart thinking — yeah, go talk to people and see what you can learn. I'll do the same. We can compare notes and figure out who seems trustworthy before things get real. Good call.
Cool, yeah I'll circle back with you in a bit and let you know what I find out. Stay sharp out there.
Will do, man. Yeah, go grab what info you can and we'll touch base before things start. Good luck out there — and hey, whatever happens, we've got each other's backs.
